name: Stack
goal: Vertical or horizontal container that places a consistent gap between every direct child — the atomic rhythm primitive for layout composition. Absorbs the former ce-cluster (wrap-row) via direction=horizontal + wrap.
description: Flex container that uses gap to enforce consistent spacing between direct children. Supports vertical and horizontal direction, eight space-scale steps, optional wrap (former ce-cluster behavior), cross-axis align (start/center/end/baseline/stretch), main-axis justify (start/center/end/between), a recursive propagation mode, and a split-after trick (Heydon Pickering's sticky-footer pattern) that pushes the Nth+1 child to the far end via margin-block-start: auto.

props.name: space
props.description: Gap size: 3xs/2xs→space-1, xs→space-2, s→space-3, m→space-4, l→space-5, xl→space-6, 2xl→space-7.

props.name: wrap
props.description: Enable flex-wrap (former ce-cluster behavior). When set, the default cross-axis align changes to center.

props.name: align
props.description: Cross-axis alignment. Defaults: stretch (no wrap), center (with wrap). Explicit values always win.

props.name: recursive
props.description: Propagate the current space value to direct ce-stack children that have not set their own space attribute.

props.name: splitAfter
props.description: Index N (1-based): child at position N+1 receives margin-block-start: auto, pushing it and subsequent children to the end of the container.

slots.description: Direct children to space; streaming-friendly — new children are picked up by the slot without requiring a render cycle.
